summary: This cluster focuses on the taxonomy and classification of the freshwater algal class Conjugatophyceae (formerly Zygnematophyceae), with a particular emphasis on the genera *Mougeotia*, *Mougeotiopsis*, and *Transeauina*. The research synthesizes historical nomenclature and modern reclassification efforts, detailing the evolutionary reorganization of the order and the establishment of a new class hierarchy. Key findings include the documentation of significant taxonomic changes and the enumeration of currently described species based on AlgaeBase data, reflecting a global but primarily freshwater ecological scope. The work underscores the ongoing refinement of species distribution and phylogenetic relationships within this group.
